title: Rebuild 10 Question
wikitext:
[]: Rebuild 1.0 Question             Quote Post by MicroBalrog » Wed Oct 14, 2009 6:36 pm At the end of Rebuild 1.0 we see Kaworu, talking to what appears to be a Lilith-like figure, on the Moon. But isn't the goal of the Angels to unite with Lilith? If she's on the Moon, why do they care about Earth at all? I mean, Kaworu is right there , he could walk right over and do his thing, am I confused?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Oct 14, 2009 6:41 pm Just because it's in a gimp suit with a mask doesn't mean it's Lillith. It has a core. I think you could add 2 and 2 now.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Oct 14, 2009 6:43 pm I think Lilith is still that same giant on the cross, just a different face/mask thing and a scar across her chest. The giant on the moon was Evangelion Unit-06, if I remember correctly.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Oct 14, 2009 6:45 pm Yup.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Wed Oct 14, 2009 7:52 pm Also the Angels wanted Adam, not Lilith. Kaworu even says so in episode 24 of the original series.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Thu Oct 15, 2009 8:49 pm But there isnt a Adam in rebuild though?So,what are they going for since they dont want Lilith and Adam is no where to be found?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Oct 15, 2009 8:52 pm Eva 04 wrote: But there isnt a Adam in rebuild though?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Oct 15, 2009 9:00 pm Eva 04 wrote: But there isnt a Adam in rebuild though?So,what are they going for since they dont want Lilith and Adam is no where to be found?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Oct 15, 2009 9:03 pm Right, I forgot about that. tagged just to be on the safe side -- 2.0  SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by DevilzillA » Fri Oct 16, 2009 6:29 pm The giant on the moon is indeed Eva-06, but the question is: what was it prior to becoming Eva-06? It can only really be one of three things: 1.) A clone of Lilith. 2.) A clone of Adam. 3.) The regenerated, original Adam. Seeing as how its blood trails down those coffins would indicate some kind of relationship between the giant and Kaworu... which I would wager rules out number 1. The fact that the damn thing is being excavated probably rules out number 2 as well. My guess is that Adam was blown to the moon's surface during Second Impact and regenerated there inside of a crater. Didn't the flashback during Kaji's story show the Antarctic sphere rising into space?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Oct 16, 2009 6:32 pm I'm pretty sure it's a clone of Adam like every other EVA that isn't Unit-01. Who says Unit-06 was dug up? SEELE could have dug a hole and placed it there.

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Fri Oct 16, 2009 7:33 pm I have my doubts that the thing in Terminal Dogma is Lilith. I bet it's Adam and we haven't even seen Lilith yet. It's the exact opposite of the original where we keep hearing "Adam this" and "Adam that" and "That's Adam", then at the last minute, we're told that it's not Adam, it's something we've never even heard of before. Now, I know, to obvious, right? Pulling a total inversion of a plot twist that we already know all about? Well it's SO obvious, that he knows we'd anticipate him doing it and never think he would, so he went and did, then we'll all be "no way! He did it again and I didn't see it coming, I must be a moron!" That cheeky bastard. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Oct 16, 2009 7:57 pm I still think it's Lillith in terminal dogma.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Oct 16, 2009 8:14 pm I agree with ThePRPD, considering various issues in Rebuild seem A LOT more straight-forward or spoon-fed compared to NGE and I think Lilith is one of them.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sat Oct 17, 2009 12:57 am Eva 04 wrote: But there isnt a Adam in rebuild though?So,what are they going for since they dont want Lilith and Adam is no where to be found?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Oct 17, 2009 12:59 am We haven't seem Adam OR Lilith. Mari is both of them.

[]:             Quote Post by Captain_Morgan » Sat Oct 17, 2009 1:21 am *prepares to be ripped apart by an angry mob* Clearly, the Moon Giant is Unit 01 from the original run. She landed on the moon somehow (basing this on the original endings to EoE) and was eventually discovered by SEELE, who then turned her into Unit 06.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Oct 17, 2009 3:34 am You stole that from TVTropes.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Oct 17, 2009 7:34 am Captain_Morgan wrote: *prepares to be ripped apart by an angry mob* Clearly, the Moon Giant is Unit 01 from the original run. She landed on the moon somehow (basing this on the original endings to EoE) and was eventually discovered by SEELE, who then turned her into Unit 06.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Sat Oct 17, 2009 8:33 am Why does everyone keep forgetting about this:
